message: fix: Update hyperfine installation to version 1.20.0 and add concurrency settings

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,10 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
 
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 jobs:
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -30,8 +34,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install hyperfine
         run: |
-          wget https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/1.20.0/hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb
-          sudo dpkg -i hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb
+          wget https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.20.0/hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
+          sudo dpkg -i hyperfine_1.20.0_amd64.deb
 
       - name: Build CLI
         run: zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
